summary: Batch-Manifest fuer die initiale Volltext-Konvertierung des AD&D 2e Player's Handbook.

next_steps: Regelmechaniken pro Kapitel in ruleset-kompatible Bausteine ueberfuehren

batch_09_monstrous_compendium_v1_extract.notes: OCR completed via easyocr; 8 trailing pages yielded <20 chars (likely plates/blank).

batch_10_monstrous_compendium_v1_monster.notes: Heuristic single-entry page parsing from OCR text; multi-column table pages skipped.

batch_11_dmgr3_arms_equipment_extraction.notes: Text-PDF via pypdf extrahiert; Kapitel/Appendix-Regex ergab keine Treffer (Layout ohne klassische Marker).
